---
title: "Arlington Loop (28% Gravel)"
---


<a href="https://www.strava.com/activities/18162634293" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">
  <i class="fa-brands fa-strava"></i> Example Strava effort
</a>

```{=html}
<article class="mobile-route-card" data-bart="El Cerrito del Norte" data-miles="14.89" data-elevation="1761.81">

<div class="mobile-route-elevation" aria-hidden="true"><img src="../data/routes/arlington-gravel-loop/profile.svg" alt="" loading="lazy"></div>
<div class="mobile-route-metrics">
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">BART</span><br>El Cerrito del Norte</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Miles</span><br>14.89</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Elevation Gain</span><br>1761.81 ft</p>
<p><span class="mobile-route-label">Road Quality</span><br>83%</p>
</div>
</article>
```
::: {.panel-tabset}

## Route

<iframe
  src="../data/routes/arlington-gravel-loop/map.html"
  style="width:100%; height:min(70vh, 560px); min-height:360px; border:none;"
  loading="lazy"
  allowfullscreen
></iframe>

<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>Hazard</th>
      <th>Distance (mi)</th>
      <th>Percent</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>Mellow</td>
      <td>9.57</td>
      <td>64.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Climb</td>
      <td>3.23</td>
      <td>22.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Descent</td>
      <td>1.36</td>
      <td>9.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Steep Climb</td>
      <td>0.58</td>
      <td>4.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Danger Zone</td>
      <td>0.15</td>
      <td>1.0</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>

## Climb Chunks

<iframe
  src="../data/routes/arlington-gravel-loop/chunk_map.html"
  style="width:100%; height:min(70vh, 560px); min-height:360px; border:none;"
  loading="lazy"
  allowfullscreen
></iframe>

<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>Workout</th>
      <th>Road</th>
      <th>Distance (mi)</th>
      <th>Time (Min)</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>TOTAL</td>
      <td>TOTAL</td>
      <td>5.5</td>
      <td></td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>climb (hard)</td>
      <td>Arlington Boulevard</td>
      <td>0.2</td>
      <td>4 ± 3</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>climb (medium)</td>
      <td>Arlington Boulevard</td>
      <td>0.9</td>
      <td>13 ± 6</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>climb (hard)</td>
      <td>Arlington Boulevard</td>
      <td>0.9</td>
      <td>15 ± 12</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>climb (medium)</td>
      <td>Arlington Boulevard</td>
      <td>0.3</td>
      <td>4 ± 2</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>climb (medium)</td>
      <td>Spruce Street</td>
      <td>2.8</td>
      <td>38 ± 19</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>climb (easy)</td>
      <td>Wildcat Creek Trail</td>
      <td>0.4</td>
      <td>5 ± 2</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>

## Street Quality

<iframe
  src="../data/routes/arlington-gravel-loop/road_quality_map.html"
  style="width:100%; height:min(70vh, 560px); min-height:360px; border:none;"
  loading="lazy"
  allowfullscreen
></iframe>

<table class="dataframe table table-striped table-sm">
  <thead>
    <tr style="text-align: left;">
      <th>mtc_pci_info</th>
      <th>Miles</th>
      <th>Percent</th>
    </tr>
  </thead>
  <tbody>
    <tr>
      <td>Gravel</td>
      <td>4.2</td>
      <td>28.4</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Good</td>
      <td>4.2</td>
      <td>28.1</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Fair</td>
      <td>2.8</td>
      <td>19.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Very Good</td>
      <td>1.4</td>
      <td>9.7</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Excellent</td>
      <td>0.4</td>
      <td>2.5</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>At Risk</td>
      <td>0.3</td>
      <td>2.2</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Poor</td>
      <td>0.3</td>
      <td>2.0</td>
    </tr>
    <tr>
      <td>Unknown</td>
      <td>1.2</td>
      <td>8.1</td>
    </tr>
  </tbody>
</table>

:::
